'''Hanson Mining Consolidated''' was a mining consortium based on [[Neona]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. They owned the planet, and mined ores from the planet's sea floor. HMC later went into partnership with [[Aquatic Ecosystems, Incorporated]] to exploit the planet's fish species as food sources.

{{Company-stub}}
